channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: ICE Says All Offices Will Have Body Cameras Within 60 Days
item.description: Half of ICE field offices now have body cameras for agents, with the rest expected to receive them within 60 days, according to the Department.

item.title: Tillis withholds Blanche vote until AG pick meets Epstein survivors
item.description: Outgoing Sen. Thom Tillis (R-N.C.) said Thursday he will not vote to confirm acting Attorney General Todd Blanche to the permanent role until Blanche ...

item.title: Fetterman threatens to abandon Democrats
item.description: Sen. John Fetterman (D-Pa.) said he'd leave the Democratic Party if it becomes the "anti-Israel party," though he signaled he had no plans to imminent...

item.title: White House teleprompter operator investigated over alleged trades on Trump speeches
item.description: Federal regulators are investigating whether a White House teleprompter operator capitalized on his knowledge of President Trump's prepared speech tex...
